name: Hygraph
description: GraphQL-native federated headless CMS with content federation capabilities

description.value: GraphQL-native federated headless CMS with content federation capabilities

repository.comment: Closed-source SaaS platform; Management SDK is open source at https://github.com/hygraph/management-sdk

license.comment: Closed-source SaaS; Management SDK is MIT licensed

initial-release.comment: Originally launched as GraphCMS in 2017; rebranded to Hygraph in 2022

github-stars.comment: Closed-source SaaS; Management SDK has ~200 stars

deployment-model.comment: Managed SaaS only; no self-hosted option

primary-language.comment: Closed-source; Management SDK written in TypeScript

database-support.comment: Proprietary backend; supports content federation from external GraphQL/REST sources

api-type.comment: GraphQL-native; first headless CMS built natively on GraphQL. Content and Mutations API

multi-tenancy.comment: Multiple environments per project; Enterprise supports multitenancy across projects

static-site-generation.comment: Works with all major SSG frameworks via GraphQL API

edge-deployment.comment: Global CDN via Fastly; assets served through Filestack CDN

content-types.comment: Schema builder for custom content models via UI or Management SDK

field-types.comment: Rich text, basic fields, relations, components, unions, remote fields via federation

content-relationships.comment: References and relations between content models; remote sources for external data

nested-components.comment: Reusable components; Hobby: 10, Growth: 20, Enterprise: custom limits

localization.comment: Content localization with locale-specific publishing and roles; Hobby: 2 locales, Growth: 3, Enterprise: up to 80

content-validation.comment: Field validation rules in schema builder

embedded-interactives.comment: Rich text editor with embeddable components; App Framework for custom extensions

content-versioning.comment: Version history created on publish; Hobby: no retention, Growth: 14-day, Enterprise: 365-day retention

draft-publish.comment: DRAFT and PUBLISHED stages by default; custom content stages on paid plans

scheduled-publishing.comment: Schedule individual entries or releases; max 50 pending releases with 50 items each

approval-workflows.comment: Custom content stages and workflows for structured publishing processes

content-locking.comment: No explicit content locking; real-time collaboration approach

audit-logging.comment: Detailed audit logs with filtering by action, environment, user, and trigger type; Owner/Admin access

media-library.comment: Built-in Digital Asset Manager (DAM) for images, videos, PDFs, and custom files

image-transformations.comment: Crop, compress, quality, border, sharpen, blur, resize, auto format; URL-based or API transformations

external-media-storage.comment: imgix, Cloudinary, AWS S3, Aprimo integrations via marketplace apps

video-support.comment: Native video upload; no video transformations; imgix for advanced video delivery

svg-support.comment: SVG files supported via Asset model

folder-organization.comment: Asset organization with bulk actions and search

role-based-access.comment: Built-in roles with custom roles available on higher tiers

granular-permissions.comment: 7 action types: Read, Read versions, Create, Update, Delete, Publish, Unpublish; model-level permissions

sso-saml.comment: SSO via Auth0 supporting SAML, WS-Fed, OAuth 2.0, OIDC, LDAP; Enterprise feature

team-collaboration.comment: Commenting and assignment workflow; team seats vary by plan (3 Hobby, 10 Growth, 200 Enterprise)

audience-restrictions.comment: API-based content delivery; access control implemented in frontend application

typescript-sdk.comment: @hygraph/management-sdk for schema management; graphql-request recommended for queries with TypeScript support

content-type-sdk.comment: Management SDK for code-driven schema migrations and programmatic content type definitions

cli-tools.comment: @graphcms/cli for project scaffolding and template generation

local-development.comment: No local backend; SaaS-only; local frontend development connects to cloud API

webhooks.comment: Granular webhooks with content stage filtering; Hobby: 5, Growth: 10, Enterprise: custom

plugin-system.comment: App Marketplace with integrations; App Framework for custom development

admin-ui-customization.comment: App Framework for custom UI extensions and sidebar apps

documentation-quality.comment: Comprehensive docs with API reference, framework guides, and editor guides; well-structured for different user roles

frontend-frameworks.comment: Official examples and documentation for Next.js, Nuxt, Gatsby (native plugin), Astro, SvelteKit

search-integration.comment: Algolia app in marketplace; webhook-based sync for external search services

preview-mode.comment: Live preview support; content stage comparison for draft vs published

ecommerce-integration.comment: Shopify, BigCommerce, Commerce Layer integrations; content federation for headless commerce

analytics-integration.comment: No built-in analytics; integrate via frontend application

ai-features.comment: AI Assist for content generation/improvement/localization; AI Agents (SEO Expert, Translation, Summarizer); MCP Server for custom LLMs; Enterprise feature

cdn-included.comment: Global CDN via Fastly; assets delivered through Filestack CDN

response-caching.comment: Dual endpoints: standard read/write plus high-performance read-only cached endpoint

rate-limits.comment: Hobby: 500K API calls/mo; Growth: 1M/mo; Enterprise: 50M+/mo; rate limiting on uncached requests

global-regions.comment: ISO 27001 certified & SOC 2 Type 2 compliant data centers; global CDN

free-tier.comment: Hobby: free forever with 1K entries, 500K API calls, 100GB asset traffic, 3 seats, 2 locales

open-source.comment: Closed-source SaaS; only Management SDK and examples are open source

pricing-model.comment: Hobby (free), Growth ($199/mo annual), Enterprise (custom); pricing based on entries, API calls, and asset traffic

commercial-support.comment: Growth: email support desk; Enterprise: dedicated support, custom SLAs, training

enterprise-features.comment: SSO, multitenancy, 365-day version retention, custom limits, AI features, dedicated support, SLAs
